title: ChatGPT
description:
Versatile AI assistant for writing, research, coding, and everyday tasks.
Multimodal capabilities including voice, image analysis, and custom GPTs.

title: Claude
description:
Exceptional at nuanced writing, complex reasoning, and long-context analysis.
Preferred for professional tasks, coding, and safe, thoughtful responses.

title: Google Gemini
description:
Multimodal powerhouse integrated with Google ecosystem.
Strong in image/video generation, research, and real-time information.

title: Midjourney
description:
Leading AI art generator known for stunning, artistic images.
Create high-quality visuals from text prompts via Discord or web.

title: Perplexity
description:
AI-powered search engine with real-time web access and citations.
Delivers accurate, sourced answers faster than traditional search.

title: Grok
description:
Helpful and maximally truthful AI built by xAI.
Great for reasoning, coding, real-time knowledge, and fun conversations.

title: Notion AI
description:
AI assistant embedded in Notion for writing, summarizing, and organizing.
Boosts productivity within your notes, docs, and team workspaces.

title: ElevenLabs
description:
Advanced AI voice generation and cloning with natural-sounding speech.
Ideal for podcasts, videos, audiobooks, and multilingual content.

title: GitHub Copilot
description:
AI pair programmer that suggests code in real-time.
Accelerates software development across multiple languages and IDEs.

title: Jasper
description:
AI content platform for marketing copy, blogs, and brand voice.
Helps teams create consistent, high-quality written content at scale.
